scripts.sync-deployments: if ls ../onchain/deployments/*.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then rm -rf deployments && mkdir -p deployments && cp ../onchain/deployments/*.json deployments/; else echo 'sync-deployments: no JSON files at ../onchain/deployments — aborting (deployments/ untouched)' >&2; exit 1; fi
scripts.build: bun run sync-deployments && bun build src/index.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/index.js
